meta.title: Beyond A2/AD: China's Use of Science and Technology in Military Strategy
meta.description: Arthur Herman, Michael Pillsbury, and Andrew Krepinevich on A2/AD, Anti-Access/Area Denial, and opportunities for U.S.-Japan cooperation in science and technology in military strategy and defense innovation. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
